data.content: Implementation complete on branch worktree-fix-920b-vertical-align (commit 602b9c431cb7). Changes: (1) TableCell align-top → align-middle in ui/table.tsx for consistent row vertical alignment. (2) Profile and owner-type ad-hoc pills normalized to h-5 height matching Badge primitive, removed py-0.5/leading-none. (3) Title column flex container switched from items-start to items-center, chevron button mt-0.5 removed. (4) Three regression tests added to beats-page-layout.test.ts verifying align-middle, h-5 pill height, and centered title column. All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 2260 tests, build.
